posts.author: TMURR (Tyler Murray)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to disable the default email signature attached to the integrated gmail account?

Context: I am one of four on my team (very small business) and am the platform admin for Monday.com. When automations send emails, I don’t want my work email signature attached to the email - is there a way to disable this?
